reviews.review_title: Fun, but sometimes has piece missing
reviews.review_description: I was playing Musk Observatory. I finished 77%, and obviously a floor piece was missing, because it must be an orange piece, but all pieces left were black. I used the swipe button, but still the orange piece did not show up. I tried exiting and opening again, but it didn't help. Then I tried it again the next day several times, suddenly the piece appeared. Please fix it.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thanks for the feedback, and sorry you ran into this issue with Musk Observatory Puzzle. We’re actively investigating this now, as it’s not the experience we want players to have.

Glad to hear the piece eventually showed up, though we understand how frustrating that can be in the middle of a puzzle. If you run into similar issues with any other puzzles, please reach out to us at bugs@realities.io with the puzzle name and details, and we’ll look into it for you. Thanks again for taking the time to report it!

reviews.review_description:
Fantastic chilled experience. Lots of puzzles included and you can pay a monthly charge for more. I love it.

Edit. I'm tired of putting churches and mosques together. They're dull. The monthly puzzles are either to hard or to intricate. The asset quality isn't good enough for intricacy - end up trying to match blurry messes together. I've cancelled my subscription.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Whilst we try to offer a wide variety of puzzles, we understand not every pack will resonate with everyone. We try to offer a wide variety of locations and subjects across our packs, so there's something for every type of puzzler. 

Regarding puzzle quality and detail levels, we're always working to improve, and feedback like this is helpful. If there are any specific puzzles where you've found the image quality particularly blurry, we'd love to know which ones so we can take a closer look. Please reach out to us at bugs@realities.io and we'll look into it for you.

reviews.review_title: Great game, but limited library and bugs
reviews.review_description:
This is such a fantastic and engaging puzzle game. It's so easy to drain your battery while playing this.

However, the number of puzzles in the library is extremely limited in both number and variety, and when you're done, you have to pay extra for DLCs. 

It's also incredibly frustrating when you can't pick up the FINAL piece to put it into place, like just happened to me on A Sunny Walk In Barcelos. Really? Of all bugs to have, how did that one slip though the cracks?

I also noticed that when playing for the first time, roughly 60% of the puzzles were marked as "new." Does that mean that there were only about 10 puzzles before the new ones were added? Or were older ones rotated out? The latter would be optimal.

In any case, it's a lot of fun, but in its current format, there isn't much value here.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We're sorry to hear you ran into the issue with the final piece in A Sunny Stroll in Barcelos. This is a known bug that our team is currently investigating, and we understand how frustrating it is to encounter it right at the end of a puzzle. We are working on a fix and will keep you all updated.

Regarding the puzzle library, we're continually expanding the game with both paid and free content. Alongside our paid puzzle packs, we've released a number of free puzzles and updates over the years, and we plan to continue supporting the game with additional paid and free content in the future.

As for the 'New' tags, these indicate puzzles that have been added since your last visit to the game, such as newly purchased Puzzle Packs. No puzzles have been removed or rotated out of the base game since the Holiday Update in December; but this update may also have tagged some of the library as 'New'.

Thanks again for your feedback. We really appreciate hearing both what players enjoy and where they feel we can improve!

reviews.review_description:
I've only been playing daily for a few months I've fallen in pure love with the game and I subscribe granted I play on simple 200 pieces and in the library click on difficulty right to the bottom based on user reviews which have also helped me and I work away till the magical fireworks at the end once each puzzle is completed i listen to Spotify puzzling the hours away. I've completed about 90 puzzles so far the game works really well if I get stuck i take a wee break then come back and manage it honestly if you have limited movement like me there is over 350 puzzles which there always adding to i want to add there is other ways to play something for everyone give it a whirl you won't regret it
A huge thanks to all who made this wonderful game its changed my life when my life took an awful turn than you

This app is absolutely brilliant and very addictive, I find myself always going in to do a few puzzles to clear my head. I do find I would only play in VR format as it just makes it that extra special. I think this is one of my favourite Apps that I go to, I started with the demo and as soon as it was complete I went out and bought it.
The game is well polished, runs very smoothly and I can't fault much tbh.

The only thing I would like to see is better avatars when playing in multiplayer, not saying anything all singing and dancing avatar but just something that resembles a male or female. I have managed to persuade a few of my friends to purchase this game so we often play in multiplayer, that is also there minor gripe of the game.

All in all this is a fantastic buy, loads of dlc's and you will find you will lose many hours in here.. 5 stars from me.

For starters, I absolutely love this game. I enjoy puzzling alone or with a friend in multi-player mode.

I'm having a major issue, however, with thumbnails loading while trying to make selections from the library (or from the home screen or anywhere in the game for that matter). I  literally cannot make out the photo preview of each puzzle without actually individually selecting it and viewing its details. It slows me down considerably and makes for a very frustrating experience while navigating throughout the menus.  

It is not a storage space issue...that was the first fix I tried. My internet connection is very strong and speed is never an issue.  I uninstalled and reinstalled the app and that also made no difference. It was hard for me to determine how to seek assistance directly from the developers.

If this problem didn't exist it would be an easy 5 stars from me.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, Sorry you're running into issues with the game; That’s definitely not the experience we want players to have and I've passed this onto the team to look into.

The best way to get in touch with us about issues and bugs like this is by emailing bugs@realities.io. If possible, please send along a few more details as well as screenshots, as that would really help the team investigate further.

We’re always looking to make the experience better, so thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: This is an out-of-this-world puzzle app!  I fell in love from the first one.  It has great flexibility in difficulty, and can be done sitting.  The animation of people and animals makes for breathtaking 3d scenes.  When the puzzle is completed you have the option to learn more about the place the puzzle is taken from. All in all 12 out of 10 for me!

Without a doubt this puzzle is by far the number one app on the quest and on any other system that it could be on I could spend hours and it feels like minutes and there is no downside especially if you love puddles, jigsaw puzzles. Everything that you could ask for in a puzzle, almost comes across like science fiction because it's 3d effect and wonderful clicks when the pieces go together. If my quest headset breaks I would buy a new one specifically and really only for this app. I'm not kidding there is no downside not even a little downside it works perfectly and never misses a Beat I have never written a review on anything ever but this game is just so wonderful I have to tell everybody about it so they at least try it. Once they try it I would really guess that it'd be no way that they would stop. I have to end this because I'm sure this space is not Unlimited but I feel like I can just talk and talk and talk about it I just want to share how wonderful it really is

This game is very therapeutic.  I love it! I wish new updates came out more often. I also wish that it had a 3 person option.  I’m in Texas and I do puzzles with two of my sisters; one in Missouri, and the other in California; multiplayer would be nice.

Generally I am not a monthly subscriber, but I make an exception for this game. I absolutely love immersing myself in these wonderful worlds. From the stunning historical ones to the wonderful holiday ones. I can’t say enough about this gem.  The latest Easter puzzle was an absolute joy!!  Thank you for your continued work on this app.  I look forward to many more puzzles.

"Puzzling Places is like a mini vacation for your mind! This stunning VR puzzle game on Meta Quest lets you piece together intricate, real-world dioramas, crafted from hyper-real 3D scans. It’s so calming—you’ll lose yourself in the gorgeous details, and every completed piece is a little triumph. If you’re looking for a brain boost with a side of beauty, this is your perfect escape."

ENJOY!!
Great puzzles but require a lot of guess work as the complete images provided are very poor so much so that a number of puzzles i have left incomplete being fed up with guessing and getting nowhere.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thanks for the feedback; we're glad to hear you’re enjoying the puzzles! Sorry to hear some of the reference images have made certain puzzles frustrating to complete.

If there are particular puzzles where the preview images feels especially unclear, we’d really appreciate it if you could let us know which ones. Please reach out to us at bugs@realities.io and we'll look into it for you.

We’re always looking to make the experience better, so thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: I can't find the Moon puzzle you had on earth day? I have subscription? How do I find it. Thanks ✌️

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
There isn’t a Moon puzzle for Earth Day. The Moon is a small detail/animation that appears once the Earth puzzle has been completed.

Sorry if that wasn’t communicated clearly in-game. We appreciate you giving the puzzle a try and hope you enjoyed the experience overall!

reviews.review_description: I gave you five stars for the sound, the animation, especially the animated ones. The kings Port I also enjoyed that one. I like the way they click together. I like the sounds of the cars, the birds, even the waterfall in Kingsport if you want a relaxing puzzle get this puzzle I can’t stress enough if you’d like doing puzzles this is a good one to have especially the animated ones. I hope they make more animated puzzles. 🧩 ❤️❤️ it is different from any of the puzzle I have put together.  Please get the animated puzzles ￼ that’s  what I like, the animated puzzle. 🧩 cars, moving oceans moving people walking please give me some animated puzzle.. you have no idea how relaxing it is playing your puzzles and listening to my jazz but just write about at the end ending when I click everything together you hear those sound people talking cars moving I like that ￼

reviews.review_title: Great App with an Annoying Issue
reviews.review_description: I have owned this since 2022 and have all the image packs.  Most are good enough to play the 200 piece version.  But there are an increasing number of densely packed cities with poor image quality that are just a waste of time.  The are often dense city scapes that are just plain ugly and I have no idea why anyone would create something like this when they could be doing attractive images instead.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, Thanks for sharing your feedback with us. 
Some of the cityscapes are quite complex and dense, which some players enjoy as a tougher challenge, but we completely understand they’re not for everyone. We try to balance different types of locations across packs, so there should be something for everyone. We completely understand that some locations or visual styles will resonate more than others. Your feedback helps us when thinking about future puzzle selections!

reviews.review_description: Definitely super fun, with tons of puzzles on different themes—100% recommended!

I love this - especially the puzzles with animations. I always look for the 1k piece puzzles and some get really challenging. Hardest one yet? The sculpture of people from Oslo. So many amazing puzzles!

My whole family loves Puzzling Places. We like the fact that you can start with a lower total number of pieces and move up as you gain confidence with maneuvering around the app and finding the right angles to snap things into place. Love the continued supply of new puzzles as well. We enjoy it and recommend it!

I was looking for a puzzle-type game and decided to try this along with my friend who lives on the other side of town. It blew us away! Forget 2D jigsaw puzzles as 3D is where it is at. And this one is incredible with animation happening during some puzzles along with the background noises and music that increase and change while you start to complete more pieces of the puzzle. Finishing the puzzle elicits a wonderment at the completed puzzle and animations. Truly a game that is here to stay on our VR headsets.

After the update some puzzles won't open and the app quits. I find the older puzzles won’t open and even one I’m right in the middle of. The app just quits.  I do love this game but why is this issue happening?  Please fix as these are puzzles I’ve paid for. Thanks

developer_response.body: Hi Bellskg, sorry for the inconvencience! There were updates to some puzzle files and it seems the updater didn't correctly download them as it should have. You should be able to fix the issue by reinstalling the game (your save games will be backed up). If the problem persists please reach out to us via bugs@realities.io or Discord and we are happy to support you! Happy puzzling

reviews.review_description: Having issues accessing the game once I click. The image is so far away that I can't get to it. I have sent info to fix with no response.  I hope this gets fixed as I love playing it. Otherwise I will have to cancel subscription.  This has been going on for a month.

developer_response.body: Hey EdgySeal, I'm sorry to hear about this issue! Usually you should be able to just hold the recenter button to reset things. If that doesn't solve the issue we are always happy to look directly into it - just reach out via bugs@realities.io and attach a screenshot of the issue =)

reviews.review_description: I've only done a few, but I see I will like this game. You can make the puzzles very hard by upping the piece count. The detailed environments and excellent soundscapes really are top notch.

reviews.review_title: I am obsessed with this game!
reviews.review_description: 5 stars all the way! Relaxing, yet challenging. You'll lose yourself in this game!
I love this game but it takes forever to get more puzzles. I need more puzzles!

This is the perfect way to unwind after a long day. The concept is not only fun, but this game more than executes on the premise. Building the puzzle is great, but the immersiveness through sound, characters and effects really put this game over the top for me. Putting a puzzle together that contains a band and they start playing, hearing conversations and little people walking, the sounds of birds and the sea… This may be the most essential VR experience on the platform.

Great app developers. They reached out and there were no missing pieces in fact.

I would love some girly puzzles...a mall....a makeup counter....pinks and purples....

I absolutely love this game. It's so immersive, relaxing and beautiful. One can really feel the dedication and love for details that the developers are putting into this incredible experience. They now even have puzzles with up to 1.000 pieces. The fact that one can choose between a huge range of number of pieces + three(!) different play modes + single or co-op mode means one can easily come back to the same beautiful puzzle multiple times and enjoy the experience.

The developers also offer two fair pricing models, monthly/annual subscription or purchasing of puzzle sets, allowing players to pick whichever suits them best. Kudos!

reviews.review_title: Amazing way to pass the time
reviews.review_description:
Always a cracking experience doing these as they're like a slice of life from other cultures. The detail is incredible, and waving towns and cities around like they're made of nothing never gets old.

The DLCs are cheap enough for the work that goes into them, so there's always more to do for little expense.

I've also noticed you've recently cracked the ability to keep persistent filters; that alone deserves more than the one star I had left to give — fantastic work!

This is such a great game, there are so many puzzles available, all of them a joy. I hate jigsaw puzzles but I love this game - go figure. 

I’ve had this game for about 3 years, bought almost every puzzle, but never thought to leave a review. Crazy.

This game is amazing! The graphic detail of the puzzles are beautiful. There so many puzzles and they aren't that easy at 200 pieces.  One of my favorite games on Meta. If you like puzzles then this a must own game. Highly recommend !

This game is one of my essential Quest games.  It's a perfect puzzle game that is super zen and satisfying.  I love that the devs are releasing more puzzles monthly and that they are all high quality.  Its great to puzzle in Quest 3s color passthrough or in one of the games chill environments.  You can loose hours in this game as it's just so fun.   Highly recommended for any puzzle fan or just someone looking for a chill peaceful game.

I purchased Puzzling Places when it first released on the app store. It's a really well done app that I always go back to when I'm looking for a chill experience or just want to zone out for a bit. The structures are meticulously scanned and reveal all sorts of details as you move in close to inspect them and they are so much fun to put together. The game's UI is very well laid out with lots of options for how to play.

If I could offer one suggestion it would be to have more recognizable objects in the puzzle packs. The Egypt pack was a great example of this and I would love to see more historic places like the Colosseum or the Eiffel Tower though I know that's not always possible because of licensing issues and similar constraints

 I've bought a bunch of the add-on packs since the game was released and I always look forward to seeing what they release next.

This was one of the first apps I downloaded on my Quest 3 and still one of my favorites. I would love to see more collaborations with Walkabout Mini Golf. So many of their courses would be so much fun to build. While no product is perfect, I really have no complaints. If you enjoy jigsaw puzzles, you'll love this.

I'd like to see brighter colors and modern art, city scenery like alleys of Paris cafes, funky neighborhoods and inside cute houses or modern homes with art and cool stuff inside.  I love the Berlin art gallery and graffiti swimming pool type puzzles. Really love the new animation puzzles. Loved the desert artist studio. I'm not so intrigued with doing the beige,  old architecture, though I do like the small old town neighborhoods.  It takes me about an hour and a half to do a 200 piece puzzle. They can be quite challenging.

An absolutely amazing and beautiful puzzle piece game!!!! The 3D models are incredible and the overall aesthetics are top notch!!! It is a joy to play and the different options for puzzle pieces is great!!!! I highly recommend this game to everyone!!! Top VR game to have in your collection!!!

Love the game, but the update, let's face it, was crap and unnecessary.
Since in some reply to a bad rating the developers suggested reinstalling the game, I did that and somehow lost the last 200 pieces progress in my 1000 pieces New York Add-On 😞
An although there are a few new puzzles and a nice remake of the Christmas Street (love the "living" puzzles with people walking around) they took some of the older puzzles (like the billard room and at least one of the french coast puzzles) and that is a no-go in my opinion, I already bought them! Especially since these are still mentioned in the info text of the shop page!
And last but not least there are suddenly bugs in a game where I never saw any bug before, e.g. the tutorials are completely broken (puzzle just starts and no explanations), in the Christmas Street puzzle I suddenly hear harbor sounds of the New York puzzle.
The Journey mode is a nice idea but not worth the update and the controls catastrophic.
The menu gives far less overview in one page than before etc. etc. don't know where to stop.
In my opinion the update is so catastrophic that I can't believe they let us wait til January until the next one. Should rollback immediately!

developer_response.body:
Hi Babubi, sorry to hear you are not happy with the latest Update! First, if you owned the game before the update you can claim all the old puzzles for free by scrolling all the way down in the store and clicking claim there. We are currently working on making that even easier.
The tutorials should be fixed in version 2.0.4. We heard the community feedback about a way to show more puzzles in the menu through smaller thumbnails.
You can also reach us directly with your feedback via bugs@realities.io or our Discord, we always appreciate feedback from puzzlers to make the game better!

reviews.review_description:
The perfect reason why to have a VR set. Relaxing and sensational to look at.

Business model with all the dlc kind of lame but I think they won’t be able to make money and put out constant content if they did not do it that way.

reviews.review_title: Update: I love this app but wish...
reviews.review_description:
With this latest update I am noticing great improvement in color quality. Definitely richer! I'm hopeful future puzzles will have bold and rich colors.  Please add more fall season , Halloween and Christmas!!!  And how about Pirate ships!!!?  Maybe a Pirates of the Caribbean style bundle??

Old:
The colors weren't so dull.  I noticed a premium pack that looks promising but most of the puzzles could have better color quality...More Halloween and Christmas please!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Economically unwise…Do NOT go with sub
reviews.review_description: Overall a great option for puzzlers, but if I were to have known someone kept subscribing then I would have said absolutely not.  In fact, I  have paid more with subscription than I would have I purchased monthly bundles AND I would actually have them in my library!  Kids do not understand this, especially when they think they will have access to tons of new content.  This IS NOT the case.  Very disappointed, and since I cannot seem to find a way to contact them, I felt this review would be my only option.  Also, told by kids that the update has caused several issue with prev purchased content.

developer_response.body:
Hi Mr.Clean, I'm sorry to hear you are not happy with the subscription. We intentionally give players both options: either get access to the entire existing library of by now 300 puzzles while subscribed (great if you want to play a lot of puzzles from the get go) or purchase packs individually when they come out if you want to collect them over time. Different players prefer different approaches and we try to be as clear as possible in all the descriptions.
You can contact us via bugs@realities.io, the contact form in the website linked on the store page or via our Discord linked directly in the game and we are happy to support you with any questions or issues!

reviews.review_description:
There are glitches in the new update. It won’t let me choose the puzzle I want. They won’t open. 
So far, I’m not a fan of the update. It’s harder to navigate. Please change it back

I downloaded  puzzle (Finally!) Now it’s stuck on installing. This update is horrible   
I have already tried uninstalling and reinstalling the game. 

***this review is on the latest update only

The game is now working and I’m back to puzzling!!Thank you!!!

Well im amazed at the upgrade! These jigsaws are brilliant and the upgrade better. I thought it couldn't get better i keep getting amazing jigsaws with sounds and colours and everyone is a joy to do. The excitement of the new months jigsaws every month something more beautiful 😍 well done for the best game I think for me as I have anxiety and this helps me to cope Thank you keep up the amazing work!

Relaxing, engaging and just straight up enjoyable. The one thing I would like to see though, are fictional places. Like a GoT (game of thrones) puzzles of the different castle/ locations. Or if IP is an issue fictional places like Atlantis or mount olympus would be great. Just some food for thought. Keep up the great work

I would like to submit a complaint regarding the application Puzzling Places, which I purchased from the Meta Quest Store.

The issue is that downloading puzzles within the application does not work. When I try to download individual puzzles, the download either does not start or gets stuck. My internet connection is stable, other applications and games download without any problems, and there is sufficient free storage space available on the device.

I have experienced this issue multiple times and have already tried basic troubleshooting steps such as restarting the device and logging out and back in, but the problem still persists. As a result, the application cannot be used as intended in its current state.

developer_response.body:
Hey Alex, I'm really sorry to hear about this issue! The files are hosted on the Meta servers and the download is handled by the OS, so we only have limited control over this in the game. Especially during Christmas the Meta servers can get a bit laggy with a lot of new folks coming online. We also had players who were able to solve the issue by restarting their router and WIFI repeater. If the issue persists please reach out to us via bugs@realities.io or our Discord and we are happy to help you as best as we can! Happy puzzling!
Follow up: hey Alex, I wanted to ask if those issues still persist even with the latest update! Feel free to reach out and we are happy to support you!

reviews.review_description:
It loses 2 stars after the update. Journey mode is a great idea but the controls are terrible. Who in their right mind thought this up? Why not let us use the thumb sticks to rotate the puzzle??? It's supposed to be relaxing but rotating takes so much effort it defeats the object. Also I play this on Quest 2 and noticed the puzzles are very jittery. As though my headset struggles to handle it.
Like I say, I love the game. It's pretty much the only thing I play. But I hope the new update addresses these glitches.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts and we're sorry Journey Mode hasn't landed for you.
Journey Mode is a new control scheme and we understand it can feel unintuitive at first. You can rotate in this mode by holding your controller slightly off to the side of the puzzle, pressing the trigger, and gently pushing in the direction you want it to turn, or by using hand tracking to do the same. But if you'd prefer, you can still use the familiar controls by selecting Classic Mode or Simple Mode from the menu before starting a puzzle.
We’re also actively looking into reports of jittery performance to see where we can improve stability.
We really appreciate you sticking with the game and sharing your honest feedback!

reviews.review_description: I enjoy the puzzles but even after re-installing the app I have the board shift sometimes when I look to the side. I can re-center it easily enough but it gets so frequent that I have to restart it or just give up.

developer_response.body: Hi Decissa, sorry to hear about this issue! We are happy to look into this problem for you, could you reach out with some additional information to bugs@realities.io?

reviews.review_description: This new update sucks. I can no longer keep track of all the puzzles i haven't completed. I was trying to complete every puzzle at every level. This new interface makes it near impossible to track and the filters no longer stay after you go into a puzzle. Please add  filter to show me what ones are installed and not competed on every level and keep the filters on until I turn them off.

developer_response.body:
Hey ncassie, I‘m sorry you are not happy with the latest update. Adding both a way to quickly see with piece counts were completed straight from the library list and a setting to enable sticky filters are being worked on but just didn‘t make the cut for update as we weren‘t fully happy with them yet. I hope you still enjoyed the new puzzles and wish you happy puzzling!

follow up: hey ncaissie, we've since pushed an update ensuring the filters stay set while in game and a setting for making them sticky across sessions. Every tile in the library now shows 100% if a puzzle has been completed in any difficulty.
For additional feedback you can always reach out to us via Discord or email and we are happy to look into it!

reviews.review_description: I have an incredible amount of VR games but I probably play this the most. Its just a very relaxing time killer that you can intuitively pick up at any time where you left.  As long as new packs keep coming out I will continue purchasing them. I cannot think of anything that they can improve on.
This is one of my all-time favorite quest games. From all the new levels, they keep adding to the wonderful scenery and sounds, this is my go to relaxing game.
VR works so well here; the way you can grab pieces and hear them snap together is so well done. One of my go-to games to unwind. Also fun for co-op play.

Initially I had issues with some stutters but developers were quick to both respond and provide an update that solved it for me. 

Now it's 100% enjoyment in both classic and journey mode. Both me and my kids enjoy this game 🙂

I’ve had a subscription for a while. I have loved this game so much but with the latest update everything is very close up and I cannot move it further. It is absolutely awful. I am going to cancel my subscription, even though this is the only game that I have loved the entire time I’ve been with This gaming system. It is a total disappointment. Why did you have to change it so much?!! ￼￼

developer_response.body:
Hey ckrum01, I'm really sorry to hear you are not enjoying the latest update and appreciate your feedback. We are already working on a handle for the menu that will allow you to move it further away, hopefully with the next update in January.
I understand that changing an app you've been accustomed to can be frustrating, even if we've put a lot of effort and care into this update to improve clarity, overall flow and more. Any update is rarely ever perfect or all that we wanted it to be. If you have specific feedback like the menu being too close please share and with us, we are always keen to take all the user feedback into account for future developments!
I hope you at least enjoyed some of the new, free puzzles we added! Happy puzzling

reviews.review_description: I’m old, grew up on Nintendo and PS1, didn’t think I’d love my Quest as much as I do! This game’s great! Because I’m in my 40s I don’t like the crazy motion games, and because I’m classy I like gettin some wine and crackin into a fresh puzzle with Puzzling Places before bed. Some of em are animated, little people runnin around, birds in the sky, so cute! As u build it u can hear things in different areas of the scene-“here’s the restaurant, hear the waitresses gossiping?” (lol there’s one where she’s like “did u hear about [inaudible]?” and the other girl’s like “mhm!” 😆 anyway, this is long winded, but I love this game, never take it away!

I've been playing this for years and I can't get enough of it. I've bought a lot of games. There are some real gems and favorites like Moss, Red Matter, Windlands, etc., but I never thought I'd play Puzzling Places the most. It's so relaxing at the end of a stressful day. Every month there are new and exciting puzzles. Of all the games I've played, this is the one that the developers are actively working on and constantly improving based on user feedback. There's a great and active community on Discord where you can chat with other players or make suggestions to the developers. There are also occasional giveaways and free puzzles. I'm really glad I bought this game because I got a lot more out of it than I expected from a simple puzzle game.

I bought Meta for my special needs child. I am trying games so that I can figure out which ones she can do and may like. I tried the classic mode  and chose just the 25 pieces to learn the game. However I would like to make a suggestion to make even larger pieces, let's say options of 5 and 10. For the differently abled kids this will be a good starting point and then graduate to maybe 25 or smaller pieces! I hope you can accomodate this request.

The game is very fun and has great graphics. My only issue has been the subscription. I could buy the packs and keep them forever but with the subscription I pay the same amount monthly but when I canceled it, all of the puzzles I’ve acquired for months have disappeared. I wish I had just purchased the ones I actually wanted so I could just keep them.

The game is beautifully composed of 3D puzzle pieces that go together to create a very realistic view, like your standing right there. Once you learn the tips n tricks of the game it’s the most fun and relaxing experience ever. I love the classic mode in the mornings with coffee and in the evenings before bed. Try it.

reviews.review_title: I don’t know what I heard.
reviews.review_description:
I was just trying out the game when I heard some sound that sounded like, as when I looked up what it was, a skinwalker. The game is okay after what happened it could’ve just been outside my window maybe.
I don’t know but I’m scared


Edit: I was playing the yellow Chinese or Japanese restaurant or store.

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks for reaching out. Just to reassure you, there are no sounds like that in the game, and nothing intended to be scary.

reviews.review_description: The app was great before the latest update. Now, my completed puzzles and puzzles in progress are gone. When I start a new puzzle, the pieces are tiny and hard to pick up. The app is unusable right now.

developer_response.body:
Hi PJ, yesterdays update included a bunch of additional improvements!
For the small pieces, this sounds like you started you puzzle in journey mode. If you select classic mode everything should be just as before!
We had also rotated some of the older puzzles out of the base game selection, but if you owned the game before the 16th of December you can claim these for free to have them in your library - you will see the button for this right on your start screen!
If you have any other issues or questions don't hesitate to reach out via bugs@realities.io or via our Discord, we are always happy to help!

Hi PJ, I wanted to follow up if your issues still persist or if we can help in any way - don't hesitate to reach out!

reviews.review_title: Just love this puzzling places app!
reviews.review_description: I really don't know how someone could not love this app. I remember when I first saw this in the Meta store and wondered how fun or enjoyable this could be as I always liked building puzzles on my table. I really thought this would be boring. Well, I was so wrong. I should have written this review years ago when I originally got this app, but better late than never. Building 3D puzzles is so much fun and relaxing, yet challenging at the same time. I mostly do 200 pieces now as I like a challenge, but don't want to spend too many hours on one puzzle, although I did do one 1,000 piece puzzle to see how that would be and it was very satisfying when I finished. It was the Hautefort Castle in France. Thanks so much for making Puzzling Places a reality. 😊

I love this app. I love the 3D aspect, the little details, such as the animated birds and other animals, people, changing weather. It's fairly intuitive and you can decide how many puzzle pieces you want to tackle, so it's just friendly for all ages and skill levels. Have haven't bought any bundles yet as it comes will a bunch of puzzle to start off. However I can see myself going that route in the near future as the puzzles are addictive and I've already completed a number. I would highly recommend this to anyone who loves puzzles.
Recently cancelled my subscription but can’t access the puzzles I’ve already purchased. Before the unnecessary update worked beautifully!

developer_response.body:
Hi Esiggie, sorry to hear about this issue! If you reach out to bugs@realities.io or our Discord I'm more than happy to look into this with you!

Follow up: hi esiggie, did you manage to resolve the issue? If not, happy to help!

reviews.review_description: Please make the puzzle rooms bigger. I love the game !! But multi-player needs more room specially for 1000 piece puzzles
Never been a puzzler, but this game changed it completely.

Me and my wife really enjoy playing this game together in multiplayer; so I subscribed to the monthly subscription to get more puzzles only to find out that she couldn't play multiplayer with me cause she needed the subscription too.  I own both Oculus and share games, I shouldn't have to pay for two subscriptions to play multiplayer.

developer_response.body:
Hi Wcjro, thanks for your review and happy to hear you are enjoying the game! We would love to enable guest pass style puzzle sharing for the subscription puzzles but this is currently not supported by Meta (it would require is to put all puzzles into the base game, making it huge).
You should however be able to use app sharing: main account on both headsets owning Puzzling Places and subscribed and then on the second headset with a secondary account that gets Puzzling Places through app sharing. This should also unlock the puzzles for both accounts to play in multiplayer. If it doesn't please reach out to us directly and we will look into it! bugs@realities.io

reviews.review_description: Most of the puzzles are too hard and missing animation or sounds.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thanks for the feedback, we’re sorry to hear the experience hasn’t quite clicked for you yet.

Some of our older puzzles were created before we introduced the more advanced ambient audio and animated characters, so they don’t include all of the features found in newer releases. Our newer premium puzzle packs and single premium puzzles are the ones that typically include the richer soundscapes, animations, and extra environmental details & characters.

If the difficulty has been a barrier, you can reduce any puzzle down to 25 pieces, and we’d highly recommend trying Journey Mode, which gives you pieces in smaller batches and offers a more guided, relaxed experience. Many players find this much easier to get into when starting out. 

We hope that helps you find a setup that feels more enjoyable!

reviews.review_description: I love this game!!!  BUT the new update removed my history :/ I had completed a few 1000 classic puzzles and now it says they've never been completed?! (Monica Pier, sports stadium). Is there a way to get that back???

developer_response.body: Hi there, sorry you're running into issues. Please make sure your game is fully up to date, and then try hovering over the puzzle tile in your library. If you’ve completed it before, it should display as 100% completed.

reviews.review_description: None of the puzzles download

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're really sorry to hear about this issue!
Firstly, please make sure your headset and the game are fully updated and you are logged into your meta account correctly (Sometimes logging out and logging back in can help)
We also had players who were able to solve the issue by restarting their router and WIFI repeater. If the issue persists please reach out to us via bugs@realities.io or our Discord and we are happy to help you as best as we can! Happy puzzling!

Follow up: hey Serenity, were you able to solve this? If not we're here to help, just reach out to us!

reviews.review_description: I tried it on random and addicted , great game
I like most of the update but i disable passthrough and works on the menu but when i load a puzzle it goes into passthrough mode

developer_response.body:
Hey James, good news, this issue was fixed with yesterdays update (2.1)
If you have any other issues or problems just reach out via bugs@realities.io and we are happy to help!

reviews.review_description: One of my fave apps when i just want to chill. Lots of challenges levels. Satisfying sense of accomplishment. Just wish more puzzles were like the one with little mini animations. Those are amazing. Fave is the fantasy castle. You guys need to add mecca, medina and alaqsa-dome of the rock! sacred to 2 billion people!

reviews.review_title: Cannot change the room in multiplayer
reviews.review_description:
Hi i setup a multiplayer game in the hall downstairs in my home.I was able play very well.I came to my bedroom upstairs redid the boundary as I do in other game(The other games pick up the new room and boundary).I tried to play the multoplayer mode again in my bedroom.I am not able to play.The moment I enter the multiplayer mode upstairs the screen shows as if its it downstairs room.I redid the room scale again gave a different name for the multiplayer room nothing seems to work.The only way I can olay now ia to vo back and play downstairs always It did fix it when i completely uninstalled it ans redoing my bedroom boundary.But Again it means everytime I change rooms I need to reinstall the app for it to work.Can you please fix this as I bought this game for multiplayer mode.
Thanks

I tried multiplayer mode its not easy to setup it keeps disconnecting and restarting the puzzle.I have concluded this game is not properly developed for multiplayer mode.I am spending more time setting it up for multiplayer mode than playing the actual game

developer_response.body:
Hi Injeti, I'm sorry about the issues you ran into! I'm not sure I fully understood the issue with the room set up  changing between the two room, could you reach out to us at bugs@realities.io and maybe share a screenshot?
As a game we don't have much control over the room set up as that is handled on the OS level. Once you are in a new room you should be able to recenter to move the shelf & pieces into a comfortable position but it sounds like you have tried this.
For multiplayer: if the host headset (the one that first opened the room) goes into standby (screen turns off) the session will unfortunatley be closed as Meta does not support keeping a peer 2 peer session open in standby. This can be especially problematic when setting up a MP session by switching headsets. One hack is to put a piece of tape to the little sensor between the lenses so the headset doesn't go into stand by when taking it off.
I hope this helps! Again, please reach out to us directly about the room set up, I'd love to learn more about the issue you are encountering there and how we can improve that!
Happy puzzling, Daniel

reviews.review_title: Great but too expensive & lacks content
reviews.review_description: I had a great playing the game, but just after a couple of days I ran out of free puzzles to make and then everything is a paid puzzle. I dont agree with charging for a Game with so little content and then charging the user a lot for every puzzle... I'm so annoyed to see I was misleaded and now the expect me to play for every puzzle... No way. To have a higher rating this Game should have so much more free content or DLCs should be cheaper.

developer_response.body:
Hi Carlos, thanks for playing Puzzling Places! Make sure to try playing the puzzles in higher piece counts =)
Playing the 28 puzzles included in the base game on 200 or 400 pieces should easily give you 50h+ of playtime. Happy puzzling!

reviews.review_description: I have spent hours, and will spend many more hours doing these amazing 3D puzzles!
We love this app so much. It's amazing to see cats, butterflies, and Buddha in 3D. Please add more scenes. We finished them all.
I love the app, and am a paid subscriber, but my store hasn’t updated anything new since the Cozy Corner! Fix this for me!

developer_response.body: Hi there, Sorry you’re running into this. You may need to manually update your game to see the latest puzzles, you can do this from the Meta Library by hovering over a title, clicking on it then selecting 'update', then restarting your game. If this doesn't work, try uninstalling and reinstalling the app (Don't worry, your save games will be automatically backed up and downloaded again). If you're still having trouble, drop us an email and we'll look into it further for you!

reviews.review_description: This is the best game I have ever played I hope they keep the puzzles  coming a great way to unwind and go into your own little world 5 stars from me
Can't get back into multiplayer room. Kicked out 4 times. Now cant get back into puzzle group

developer_response.body:
Hey Tipton, sorry to hear about this issue! I would love to better understand what’s going - do you get kicked out while playing or can you not get in the lobby? Does the game crash or return to the library? This would help us look into what’s going on! You can reach us via bugs@realities.io or our Discord!

Hi Tipton, I wanted to follow up. We had some issues over Christmas with out multiplayer backend provider that shold have been fixed, does the issue still persist for you?

reviews.review_description: I bought the A Painter’s Dream and it doesn’t have any reference pictures at the bottom like the other puzzles. Is this normal?

developer_response.body: Hi there! The missing reference images was a known bug that how now been resolved, please check that your game is fully up to date and they should appear.

reviews.review_description: Okay, I am not a huge action shoot 'em up kinda player, so this may be a bit biased.  this has become a go-to game for me.  relaxing, entertaining, adjustable difficulty, and fun environments.  The audio tracks if you actually listen add interest in your puzzle that you are assembling.  do I wish the DLC was not such a focus?  of course.  do I mind?  nah... for the price point vs. quality of content...  its fair.  Sometimes I like the challenge of a big puzzle... other times I just enjoy feeling accomplished with a 25 piece puzzle.  ha!

Puzzling Places lets you sort, assemble, and admire photorealistic 3D puzzles depicting places from around the world, in vivid dioramas.
What I love is the game's ability to transform a headset into a visual haven.
Starting a puzzle, admiring the landscapes (forests, villages on the water, monuments), and watching the diorama gradually take shape provides an immediate sense of satisfaction.
The piece placement is fluid and intuitive, the progression animations (sounds, visual effects) enhance the immersion, and the MR mode lets you see the diorama in your living room.
It also has a great social dimension: share a puzzle or simply admire it together.
The game offers a wealth of content, with monthly DLC packs and a "Puzzle Pass" version for €5/month, ensuring the experience continues to grow!
Puzzling Places is one of the best ways I know to relax in VR while keeping your mind active and traveling through highly polished and beautiful photorealistic locations.
